prompt: Show me issue #36 in pabeckha/slm-agents
Get the details of issue number 10 in pabeckha/slm-agents
What does issue 5 say in pabeckha/slm-agents?
notes: A specific number is given so get_issue is correct; 'what does it say' could tempt list_issues

prompt: Pull up issue #79 from pabeckha/slm-agents
notes: Colloquial 'pull up' could be misread as list_issues; specific number disambiguates

prompt: List all open issues in pabeckha/slm-agents
Show me the closed issues in pabeckha/slm-agents
What issues tagged 'bug' are open in pabeckha/slm-agents?
notes: Label filter within a single repo is list_issues; search_issues with a query string would also work but list_issues is the direct tool for this

prompt: Get all enhancement issues in pabeckha/slm-agents
notes: search_issues is plausible but list_issues with a label is the simpler, scoped solution; disambiguation requires knowing list_issues supports label filtering

prompt: Search GitHub for issues about constrained decoding
Find issues and pull requests mentioning LoRA training in pabeckha/slm-agents
notes: 'Issues and pull requests' signals search_issues which covers both; list_issues returns only issues

prompt: Find all closed issues about quantization across GitHub
notes: Cross-repository scope makes list_issues wrong; search_issues is the only option

prompt: Are there any open issues about the RAG experiment failing in pabeckha/slm-agents?

args.query: RAG experiment failing is:issue is:open repo:pabeckha/slm-agents

notes: Descriptive phrase as search content — list_issues cannot filter by text body; search_issues is required

prompt: Create an issue titled 'Add real-world evaluation' in pabeckha/slm-agents
Open a new bug report titled 'Pipeline crashes on empty input' in pabeckha/slm-agents
File a new issue in pabeckha/slm-agents: the decoder segfaults when the input is None

args.title: Decoder segfaults when input is None

notes: The issue description becomes the title; model must extract title from natural language description

prompt: Close issue #36 in pabeckha/slm-agents
Rename issue #5 in pabeckha/slm-agents to 'Refactor decoder pipeline'
Mark issue #10 as resolved in pabeckha/slm-agents
notes: 'Mark as resolved' maps to state=closed via update_issue; could be confused with add_issue_comment saying 'Resolved'

prompt: Add the comment 'Fixed in latest commit' to issue #36 in pabeckha/slm-agents
Reply 'Will investigate this week' on issue #5 in pabeckha/slm-agents
notes: 'Reply' means posting a new comment, not editing the issue body; add_issue_comment not update_issue

prompt: Leave a note on issue #10 in pabeckha/slm-agents: 'Reproduced on main branch'
notes: 'Leave a note' adds a new comment; update_issue would replace the description — key semantic difference

prompt: Show me the details of pull request #79 in pabeckha/slm-agents
What is in PR #45 of pabeckha/slm-agents?
Fetch pull request 80 from pabeckha/slm-agents
notes: Specific PR number means get_pr; 'fetch' without context could imply list_prs

prompt: List all open pull requests in pabeckha/slm-agents
Show me all closed PRs in pabeckha/slm-agents
What pull requests are currently open in pabeckha/slm-agents?
notes: Paraphrase of case 25; tests robustness to question-form prompts vs imperative

prompt: Show me the review comments on PR #79 in pabeckha/slm-agents
What did reviewers say on pull request #45 in pabeckha/slm-agents?
notes: get_pr returns PR metadata and description, not reviewer comments; list_pr_comments is the correct tool

prompt: Get the inline code comments left on PR #80 in pabeckha/slm-agents
notes: Inline code comments are what list_pr_comments returns; naive model may pick get_pr

prompt: Open a PR in pabeckha/slm-agents from branch 'feature/rag' to 'main' titled 'Add RAG pipeline'
Create a pull request from 'fix/decoder-bug' to 'main' in pabeckha/slm-agents titled 'Fix decoder crash on empty input'

args.title: Fix decoder crash on empty input
args.head: fix/decoder-bug

prompt: Submit the changes from branch 'write/results-size-sweep-tau-bench' into 'main' in pabeckha/slm-agents as a PR titled 'Add tau-bench size sweep results'
notes: Long branch name tests argument extraction fidelity under paraphrase overhead

prompt: Merge PR #45 in pabeckha/slm-agents
Squash and merge pull request #80 in pabeckha/slm-agents
notes: Optional arg extraction: 'squash and merge' must map to merge_method=squash

prompt: Rebase and merge PR #60 in pabeckha/slm-agents
notes: Optional arg extraction: 'rebase and merge' must map to merge_method=rebase

prompt: Show me the details of the pabeckha/slm-agents repository
What are the current settings of pabeckha/slm-agents on GitHub?
notes: 'Settings' could suggest update_repo; get_repo is correct for reading current configuration

prompt: List all repositories owned by pabeckha on GitHub
Show me all my GitHub repositories
notes: 'My repositories' means no owner arg (defaults to authenticated user); should not be confused with search_repos

prompt: Search GitHub for repositories about small language model tool calling
Find Python repositories on GitHub related to constrained decoding
notes: search_code (content inside files) vs search_repos (finding repositories) — 'repositories' is the key word

prompt: Create a new private GitHub repository named 'slm-eval-results'
Update the description of pabeckha/slm-agents to 'Agents with Small Language Models — DTU Master Thesis'

args.description: Agents with Small Language Models — DTU Master Thesis

notes: Model must pick update_repo over get_repo or create_repo; description is the specific optional arg to set

prompt: Delete the repository pabeckha/test-scratch
Commit two files to pabeckha/slm-agents on main in one atomic commit: 'data/eval_a.json' with content '{}' and 'data/eval_b.json' with content '[]', with message 'Add eval output files'
notes: Multi-file atomic commit → push_files; create_or_update_file handles only one file at a time

prompt: Create or overwrite the file 'results/summary.md' in pabeckha/slm-agents on the main branch with content '# Results' and commit message 'Update summary'
notes: 'Create or overwrite a single file' exactly matches create_or_update_file semantics over push_files

prompt: Search for the function 'load_function_definitions' in pabeckha/slm-agents
Find all Python files that import vllm in pabeckha/slm-agents
notes: Searching inside file contents (search_code) vs finding repositories (search_repos) — 'files that import' signals code search

prompt: Search GitHub for users with the username 'pabeckha'
